case_title: HANA TORRISI VS. DONNA ALCONCEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRISI, HANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALCONCEL, DONNA DONNA ALCONCEL DESIGNS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT SERVED TIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF HANA TORRISI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HWA SING KWEI, MANADARIN COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT DONNA ALCONCEL IS PRESENT AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND ON BEHALF OF DONNA ALCONCEL DESIGNS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
